evals.prompt: 处理视频 fitness.mp4，级别 B
evals.expected: Whisper transcription completes, outputs fitness.md to content-inbox with raw transcript and timestamp markers

evals.prompt: 处理 YouTube 视频 https://youtube.com/watch?v=xxx，级别 C
evals.input: YouTube URL, 操作: C (transcribe + validate + materialize)
evals.expected: yt-dlp downloads video, Whisper transcribes, research-hub validates claims against authoritative sources, blog-material.md generated with structured sections

evals.prompt: 处理 B 站视频，级别 D，生成博客草稿
evals.expected: Full pipeline: download → transcribe → validate → materialize → blog draft with title, summary, key points, and full content sections using templates/blog-material.md

evals.prompt: 处理心理健康主题视频，级别 C
evals.input: mental health / emotional wellness video, 操作: C
evals.expected: Validation focuses on psychology research sources (not PubMed); scenarios.md scenario type: 情感/心理; output notes research citations
